name: BuildingAndPlanningPermits
description: This excel spreadsheet contains permit details for the Spokane County Building and Planning Department. Permit data ranges back six years from the current date.

name: Signals
description: Four types of signals are (i.) Stop light; (ii.) Crosswalk, (iii.) Flasher (school zones; the area between the angled arrows), and (iv.) Beacon (the flashing signals at intersections)

description: Dataset shows recorded plats with lots.
